title: Vending machines
description: a simple vending machine mod. money included.
body:
#### FEATURES:
this mod adds:
- player-controlled vending machines in every minecraft(vanilla) dye color.
- wallets

IMAGES:

![colors](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/413/455/2021-12-08_08.png)
![wallet](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/485/933/310/172/2022-08-14_10.png)
![purchasing power!](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/483/788/310/172/2022-08-06_15.png)
